name: @lamartinecabral/sekret
description: A tiny wrapper for password-based encryption and decryption.

scripts.prepack: node scripts/setversion.js up && npm start && node scripts/setversion.js down
scripts.build:umd: tsc -d -m umd --outDir dist && node scripts/fixumd.js dist/index.js
scripts.build:esm: tsc -m esnext && mv src/index.js dist/index.esm.js && cp dist/index.d.ts dist/index.esm.d.ts
scripts.start: npm install && npm run build:umd && npm run build:esm
scripts.tag: v=$(node -p "'v'+require('./package.json').version") && git tag $v && git push origin $v

author: lamartinecabral
